=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts(6,10): suggestion TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
/.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts(6,10): warning TS377083: This `yield*` is applied to a nested `Effect.gen(...)` that can be inlined in the parent Effect generator context. effect(nestedEffectGenYield)

/.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts(30,11): suggestion TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
/.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts(30,11): warning TS377083: This `yield*` is applied to a nested `Effect.gen(...)` that can be inlined in the parent Effect generator context. effect(nestedEffectGenYield)


==== /.src/nestedEffectGenYield.ts (9 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics nestedEffectGenYield:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    export const inEffectGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
    	 yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    	        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    	        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    	 	yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    	 })
    ~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
    ~~~~
!!! warning TS377083: This `yield*` is applied to a nested `Effect.gen(...)` that can be inlined in the parent Effect generator context. effect(nestedEffectGenYield)
    
    	 yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    	 	return 2
    	 }).pipe(Effect.asVoid)
    })
    
    export const inEffectFn = Effect.fn("inEffectFn")(function*() {
    	 yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    	        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    	        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    	 	yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    	 })
    ~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
    ~~~~
!!! warning TS377083: This `yield*` is applied to a nested `Effect.gen(...)` that can be inlined in the parent Effect generator context. effect(nestedEffectGenYield)
    })
    
    export const inEffectFnUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
    	 yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    	        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    	        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    	 	yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    	 })
    ~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
    ~~~~
!!! warning TS377083: This `yield*` is applied to a nested `Effect.gen(...)` that can be inlined in the parent Effect generator context. effect(nestedEffectGenYield)
    })
    
    export const nestedRegularFunction = Effect.gen(function*() {
    	const deferred = () =>
    		Effect.gen(function*() {
    		~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    			yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    			       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    			       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    				yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    			})
    ~~~~~
    ~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
    ~~~~~
!!! warning TS377083: This `yield*` is applied to a nested `Effect.gen(...)` that can be inlined in the parent Effect generator context. effect(nestedEffectGenYield)
    		})
    ~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
    
    	return deferred
    })
